INLAND REVENUE DEPARTMENT 
Notice to the Taxpayers

column2:
Implementation of New Tax Proposals on 
Change of Value Added Tax Rate 
Value Added Tax and Nation Building Tax 
on the Instruction of the Ministry of Finance

column1:
V
  
    
   
s instructed by the Ministry of Finance, new tax proposals made to Value Added 
Tax  (VAT)  and  Nation  Building  Tax  (NBT)  and  approved  by  the  Cabinet  of 
Ministers,  will  be 
implemented 
subject 
to 
formal  amendments 
to 
legislation. 
 
1.  VAT  rate  will  be  revised  to  8%  with  effect  from  December  01,  2019. 
However,  VAT  rate  applicable  on  supply  of  Financial  Services  will  be 
continued at 15% 
 
2.  NBT will be abolished with effect from December 01, 2019 
 
3.  The  liable  limit  for  registration  of  VAT  will  be  increased  to  300  Mn  per 
annum with effect from January 01, 2020 
isit - www.ird.gov.lk 
Commissioner General of Inland Revenue 
TAXES - FOR A BETTER FUTURE
